summary: Established the recurring Lean proof-health governance review and append-only decision log.
rationale: Track-5 proof health needs deterministic review cadence, explicit owner participation, durable bead/artifact links, and a required record for temporary decisions so proof debt cannot drift without an expiry.

bead_status_changes.reason: Governance cadence, participants, artifact set, decision template, and append-only decision log are now contract-validated.

summary: Defined phase-exit signoff records for Lean proof-health milestones.
rationale: Phase exits must preserve the proof-to-runtime evidence chain by linking refinement and invariant artifacts to bead status changes and by requiring explicit dependency-change records whenever blockers are added or removed.

bead_status_changes.reason: Phase-exit governance decision records now link bead updates and evidence artifacts.
